channel.title: David Einhorn — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED GRBK (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added GRBK in Q4 2025 · 29.4% of portfolio. Top conviction: more Green Brick.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED CNH (+35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added CNH in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio. Building out the new CNH position.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED GRBK (+5%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added GRBK in Q3 2025 · 28.7% of portfolio. Top conviction add — homebuilder.

item.title: David Einhorn: NEW POSITION CNH · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) new position CNH in Q3 2025 · 2.8% of portfolio. New agricultural equipment position.

item.title: David Einhorn: EXITED PENN · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) exited PENN in Q3 2025. Closed PENN Entertainment fully.

item.title: David Einhorn: TRIMMED TECK (-8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) trimmed TECK in Q3 2025 · 7.4% of portfolio. Small copper profit-take.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED GRBK (+3%) · Q2 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added GRBK in Q2 2025 · 27.4% of portfolio. Holding conviction.

item.title: David Einhorn: TRIMMED GRBK (-8%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) trimmed GRBK (GREEN BRICK PARTNERS INC) in 2023-Q4 · 28.9% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED KD (+14%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added KD (KYNDRYL HLDGS INC) in 2023-Q4 · 6.4% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED THC (+44%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added THC (TENET HEALTHCARE CORP) in 2023-Q4 · 4.9% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED WFRD (+6%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added WFRD (WEATHERFORD INTL PLC) in 2023-Q4 · 2.2% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED DHT (+87%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added DHT (DHT HOLDINGS INC) in 2023-Q4 · 1.8% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: NEW POSITION VRSN (+100%) · 2023-Q4
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) new position VRSN (VIATRIS INC) in 2023-Q4 · 1.8% of portfolio.

item.title: David Einhorn: NEW POSITION SPGI (+100%) · 2023-Q4
